kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! King Mouse here, your septic service operations manager. I handle your pumping schedules, inspection bookings, and customer follow-ups so you can focus on keeping systems flowing. What do you need?

quickActions.label: Schedule a tank pumping
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a septic tank pumping for a residential customer this week.

quickActions.label: Create a repair estimate
quickActions.prompt: Draft an estimate for a drainfield repair including excavation and new laterals.

quickActions.label: Check overdue maintenance
quickActions.prompt: Show me customers whose septic tanks are overdue for pumping based on their last service date.

quickActions.label: View today's pump-out schedule
quickActions.prompt: Show me today's pumping schedule and truck assignments.

quickActions.label: Send maintenance reminders
quickActions.prompt: Send pumping reminder notices to customers approaching their 3-year service interval.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a septic service business. You understand septic tank pumping, drainfield inspection and repair, system installation, riser and lid replacement, baffle repair, grease trap servicing, and regulatory inspection requirements. You help manage pump truck schedules, generate estimates for installations and repairs, track customer maintenance intervals, and handle emergency service calls. Always reference local health department regulations and EPA guidelines when relevant.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your local septic system experts. How can I help you today?
commonReasons: Report a backup or slow drain
Get a quote for a new system installation
Inquire about real estate transaction inspections
Ask about maintenance plans and pumping intervals

steps.title: Business details
steps.description: Enter your septic service company name, address, service area, and contact information.

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select the septic services you provide: pumping, inspections, installations, drainfield repair, grease traps, and more.

steps.title: Your crew
steps.description: Add your pump truck operators and field technicians with their certifications and availability.

steps.title: Pricing & estimates
steps.description: Set your base rates for tank pumping by size, inspections, and common repair jobs.

steps.title: Connect your tools
steps.description: Link your Google Business Profile, payment processor, and any dispatch or routing software you use.

steps.title: Go live
steps.description: Review your setup, activate your AI receptionist, and start capturing septic service leads.

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a septic service business.
capabilities: Schedule and dispatch septic pumping and inspection jobs
Generate estimates for tank pumping, drainfield repair, and new installations
Track customer maintenance intervals and send pumping reminders
Manage pump truck assignments and optimize daily routes
Handle emergency backup service calls with priority dispatching
Monitor tank size records and service history per property
Send automated review requests after completed service calls
Track regulatory inspection deadlines and compliance requirements
Manage customer communication for appointment confirmations and follow-ups
Analyze revenue by service type and identify seasonal demand patterns
